old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2.2","title":"Make DIS response destination-aware","description":"Require DIO/DIS destination local unicast or ff02::1a. Targeted unicast DIS may trigger immediate unicast DIO; multicast DIS resets Trickle and does not transmit immediately.","acceptance_criteria":"Unicast DIS immediate response works; multicast DIS schedules via Trickle poll/send path without response storm; invalid destinations reject.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:32.751262002Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:32.751262002Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:32.835072684Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Made DIS destination-aware: ff02::1a resets/starts Trickle with no immediate DIO, while targeted unicast DIS retains immediate unicast response. Added no-response/pending-Trickle and unicast-response assertions. Full node suite and strict scoped Clippy pass.
